_comment: Shape source: https://http-observatory.security.mozilla.org/api/v1/analyze?host=<h> response (top-level scan summary) plus the result of /api/v1/getScanResults?scan=<id>. We merge the relevant bits into one fixture: `grade`, `score`, and a `tests` map of {name: {pass, score_description, score_modifier}}.

content-security-policy.score_description: Content Security Policy (CSP) header not implemented

redirection.score_description: Initial redirection from HTTP to HTTPS
